exploration_notes: Traced the complete Apache Camel message routing architecture from Component→Endpoint→Consumer→Processor→Producer. The RouteReifier bridges RouteDefinition (DSL model) to runtime by recursively reifying ProcessorDefinitions via ProcessorReifier.reifier() factory, wrapping each in a DefaultChannel (with interceptors, error handlers, tracing), composing them into a RoutePipeline, and wrapping that in CamelInternalProcessor (with UoW, lifecycle, policy advices). DefaultRoute.gatherRootServices() co
